'''Dux Pike''' was an [[Epicanthix]] who was skilled in the art of [[Teräs Käsi/Legends|Teräs Käsi]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] started, he participated in a Teräs Käsi competition on [[Bunduki/Legends|Bunduki]] until he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Phow Ji]]. Dux was survived by his [[Dux Pike's wife|wife]] and twin daughters<ref name="HNN" /> [[Zan Pike|Zan]] and [[Zu Pike|Zu]].<ref name="TSS" />
